ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword phrase being analyzed */,
  "cpc" REAL /* Cost per click for the keyword in USD */,
  "pcc" REAL /* Competition level for the keyword */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Search volume for the keyword */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score indicating potential effectiveness */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the keyword in characters */,
  "keyword_category" TEXT /* Category of the keyword */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of keyword */,
  "landing_page_url" TEXT /* Landing page URL associated with the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_goal" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "ad_platform" TEXT /* Advertising platform used for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_campaigns" (
  "keyword_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the keyword-campaign relationship */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign that the keyword is part of */,
  "keyword_match_type" TEXT /* Match type for the keyword */,
  "keyword_bid" REAL /* Bid amount for the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_campaigns_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketer, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_scope" TEXT /* Scope of access for the user (e.g., campaign-level, keyword-level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword that was analyzed */,
  "date_analyzed" TEXT /* Date the keyword was analyzed */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Performance score resulting from the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_analysis_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the report pertains to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path for the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "cpc" REAL /* Historical CPC for the keyword */,
  "pcc" REAL /* Historical PCC for the keyword */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Historical search volume for the keyword */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Historical score for the keyword */,
  "history_event" TEXT /* Event that triggered the historical record */,
  "history_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_history_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_groups" (
  "keyword_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the keyword group */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_groups_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targets" (
  "campaign_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the campaign target */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "target_metric" TEXT /* Metric being targeted (e.g., conversion rate, cost per conversion) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_opportunities" (
  "keyword_opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the keyword opportunity */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the opportunity */,
  "opportunity_type" TEXT /* Type of opportunity (e.g., long-tail opportunity, competitor gap) */,
  "opportunity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the potential of the opportunity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keyword_opportunities_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)
